projects.recommendation: Approve the proposed architecture and proceed to Phase 1 with a fully staffed delivery team.
projects.decision: ON HOLD - Phase 1 temporarily placed on hold due to resource conflicts with the ERP programme. A resume decision will be revisited in 8 weeks once capacity is confirmed.
